notes: Generated at the end of examples.test.ts during vitest.
Covers Super Unix Shell Plotter visual states captured from the ASM example suite.
consoleLines: [test] ASM examples > "Éditeur FS ASM" assembles and fits in code memory
[test] ASM examples > "Super Unix Shell Plotter" assembles and fits in code memory
[test] ASM examples > "Super Unix Shell Plotter" boots from the shared FS fonts and draws on the plotter
[test] ASM examples > "Super Unix Shell Plotter" draws one typed command character once on the last line
[test] ASM examples > "Super Unix Shell Plotter" CAT updates the plotter preview for the selected file
[test] ASM examples > "Super Unix Shell Plotter" finds late files in a long directory and switches between help/preview
[test] ASM examples > "Éditeur FS ASM" opens /o filename on the real FS and edits that file with arrow movement
[test] ASM examples > "Éditeur FS ASM" creates a new file with /o filename and saves it in bootloader FS format
[test] ASM examples > "Éditeur FS ASM" switches between several files and preserves each one
[test] ASM examples > "Boot Args - Cat" reads the file chosen by the bootloader
